scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:sync:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:android:production: npm run build:production && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:release:production: npm run android:check-signing && npm run android:assets && npm run cap:sync:android:production && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.android:bundle:production: npm run cap:sync:android:production && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.android:playstore: npm run android:check-signing && npm run android:assets && npm run android:bundle:production
